### Failure Analysis

### Recommended Actions
1. Check the [workflow run](${{ RUN_URL }}) for detailed error logs
2. Review recent changes to identify potential breaking changes
3. Run affected tests locally to reproduce the issue:
   ```bash
   # For unit tests
   pytest tests/unit/ -v --tb=short
   
   # For integration tests (requires Redis/PostgreSQL)
   pytest tests/integration/ -v --tb=short
   ```
